title: nephrolepis biserrata var. normalis
intro:
Nephrolepis biserrata var. normalis, also known as the Normal Fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Polypodiaceae, specifically a type of fern that belongs to the genus Nephrolepis.

This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which have been attributed to the presence of various compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits associated with Nephrolepis biserrata var. normalis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and exhibit antioxidant activity. Nephrolepis biserrata var. normalis can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential uses and effects on human health.
